_meta.note: 23rd major-arc enrichment dip; 5th of the A-roundup campaign (Matt S154). A2.4 Tyrion's ADWD Essos journey from Tywin's murder to the gates of Meereen. BUILD + ENRICH with a HEAVY dedup: Tyrion is a saturated POV (224 core-out edges) and the Shy-Maid household (S147 AEGON) + Meereen destination (S144 Daenerys/Meereen) + the KL launch web (S109/S139 Tywin's-death) were already built; the dedup killed the whole dyad web, the cyvasse-as-events, the penny-attacks/widow-brokers/illyrio-delivers/tyrion-deduces-griff nodes, and the Moqorro edges. 7 NEW event nodes + 45 edges. The arc's EVENT spine was almost entirely islanded (stone-men-attack cOut=cIn=0; trial/wedding-hizdahr islanded; Pentos/Jorah-capture/sale/pale-mare/Second-Sons-join existed only as bare dyad edges or not at all). SPINE BUILT (chronological): tyrion-arrives-in-pentos (wires the islanded-forward launch varys-smuggles-tyrion FORWARD) -> jorah-captures-tyrion (reifies the bare CAPTURES dyad at Selhorys) -> oppo-killed-by-sailors-in-volantis (the Penny crux) -> shipwreck-of-the-selaesori-qhoran -> tyrion-and-penny-sold-to-yezzan -> pale-mare-sweeps-the-yunkish-camp (LIGHTS the 0-edge bloody-flux node) -> tyrion-joins-the-second-sons (TERMINUS, ENABLES siege-of-meereen). WHODUNIT done HONESTLY: cersei SUSPECTED_OF the Oppo killing (the bounty drove the misidentification dwarf-killings; the text never names who sent the sailors -> SUSPECTED_OF Tier-2, not a KILLS); daenerys MOTIVATES jorah (the capture's motive = regaining her favour). OBJECTS lit: tyrions-mushrooms (OWNS, was 0-edge), pretty-pig + crunch (penny OWNS), tyrion DEFEATS haldon + ben-plumm (cyvasse), tyrion MANIPULATES ben-plumm via_flattery + REVEALS_TO (the recruitment con). KINSHIP: oppo SIBLING_OF penny, hop-bean PARENT_OF penny+oppo (lights hop-bean). THEORY-GATED (node-prose, NO edges): Aegon-is-real/fAegon, Illyrio's true game, Moqorro's fire-vision reading. NO TWOW: ADWD ends with Tyrion JOINING the Second Sons; the turning-cloaks-BACK is node-prose only. All 7 new nodes container-tagged [essos] (genuine Essos-set beats). Carried a BORDERLINE greyscale seam (stone-men-attack ENABLES greyscale -- the JonCon infection vector; flagged verify, grammar-iffy event->disease).

edges.quote: the lid cracked open suddenly
edges.note: The smuggling operation (Tyrion shipped in a wine cask) delivers him to Illyrio's Pentos cellar; cracking the cask open IS the arrival. Wires the islanded-forward launch hub (varys-smuggles cOut was 0).

edges.quote: Tyrion gasped greedily
edges.note: Tyrion is decanted from the cask onto Illyrio's cellar floor — the arriving party.

edges.quote: My house is yours
edges.note: Illyrio receives and hosts Tyrion as Varys's ward — the host who takes him in.

edges.quote: This is Pentos, yes?
edges.note: The arrival is set in Pentos, at Illyrio's manse.

edges.quote: He drank his way across the narrow sea.
edges.note: Cross-arc seam (S109 Tywin's-death -> Tyrion/Essos): Tyrion's patricide drives his suicidal dissolution and the whole exile arc. Distinct from the existing jaime-reveals-tysha MOTIVATES tyrion (that drove the killing itself; this is the post-murder guilt/drift). Flagged verify for possible redundancy.

edges.quote: Deliver you
edges.note: Jorah seizes Tyrion to deliver him to Daenerys. Reifies the bare CAPTURES dyad as an event.

edges.quote: outrun him than outfight him
edges.note: Tyrion, drunk, cannot escape or fight off Jorah — the captive.

edges.quote: Selhorys was still accounted a mere town
edges.note: The seizure happens in a brothel at Selhorys on the upper Rhoyne.

edges.quote: To serve her. Defend her. Die for her, if need be.
edges.note: Jorah's every move in the arc is driven by regaining Daenerys's favour; seizing Tyrion as a gift is his method. MOTIVATES -> character.

edges.quote: they took my brother and killed him
edges.note: Oppo is beheaded by the sailors.

edges.quote: When they realized I was a girl they let me go
edges.note: Penny is present, spared, and sees her brother killed.

edges.quote: the horror visited on her in Volantis
edges.note: The killing happened in Volantis.

edges.quote: A gift for my sweet sister. He was another dwarf.
edges.note: WHODUNIT done HONESTLY: Cersei's bounty on Tyrion's head drives the chain of misidentification dwarf-killings (Oppo in Volantis, a juggler in Tyrosh). The published text never names who sent these specific sailors -> SUSPECTED_OF (Tier-2, never proven), not a KILLS. Flagged verify.

edges.quote: All the fight went out of her at that
edges.note: Oppo's murder drives Penny's grief and her initial hatred of Tyrion. MOTIVATES -> character.

edges.quote: they took my brother and killed him
edges.note: Oppo and Penny are siblings (the dwarf-jouster duo). New kinship dyad; penny MOURNS oppo already exists.

edges.quote: In Oldtown they used to call him Hop-Bean.
edges.note: Penny says 'our father ... they used to call him Hop-Bean' — the famous mummer who bought his freedom. Lights the hop-bean node.

edges.quote: It was Father's idea to do the tilts
edges.note: The father trained the first pig and devised the dwarf-jousting tilts that Oppo took over when he grew too sick — same father, same act.

edges.quote: the Selaesori Qhoran was a broken thing
edges.note: Tyrion survives the storm that breaks the cog.

edges.quote: surviving passengers and crew came crawling back on deck
edges.note: Penny is aboard and survives.

edges.quote: surviving passengers and crew came crawling back on deck
edges.note: Jorah is aboard and survives the wreck.

edges.quote: None had put up any sort of fight when the slavers boarded their crippled cog.
edges.note: The wreck strands the survivors; slavers board the crippled cog and carry them to the auction. ENABLES — the shipwreck is the precondition; the slavers' free act produces the sale.

edges.quote: He was a slave in a golden collar
edges.note: Tyrion is sold into Yezzan's grotesquerie, collared and belled.

edges.quote: One of Yezzan's special treasures.
edges.note: Penny is sold alongside Tyrion as one of Yezzan's treasures.

edges.quote: The knight had not adapted well to bondage.
edges.note: Jorah is sold as a dangerous slave, caged and beaten nightly.

edges.quote: One of Yezzan's special treasures.
edges.note: Yezzan is the buyer who acquires Tyrion + Penny + Jorah at the auction outside Meereen.

edges.quote: the heat of a Meereenese morning
edges.note: The auction and Yezzan's camp are in the Yunkish siege lines outside Meereen.

edges.quote: The pale mare
edges.note: Yezzan is struck down by the pale mare in the outbreak.

edges.quote: The pale mare
edges.note: Yezzan is diagnosed with the pale mare (bloody flux). Lights the 0-edge bloody-flux node.

edges.quote: Their mammoth master had died on the day of their escape
edges.note: Yezzan dies of the pale mare on the day of the escape (confirmed by Brown Ben Plumm).

edges.quote: the heat of a Meereenese morning
edges.note: The outbreak sweeps the Yunkish siege camp outside Meereen.

edges.quote: We will never have a better chance than now
edges.note: The plague-chaos (Yezzan dying, Nurse dead, heirs fleeing, no one counting slaves) is the escape window Tyrion explicitly seizes. ENABLES — the outbreak is the precondition; the escape is the free act.

edges.quote: I am now a Second Son.
edges.note: Tyrion signs the company book in blood — the enrollment act.

edges.quote: just below Jorah Mormont's far more modest signature
edges.note: Jorah co-enrolls; his signature sits just above Tyrion's in the book.

edges.quote: Tyrion found Penny asleep in a corner of their tent
edges.note: Penny crosses into the Second Sons camp with Tyrion and Jorah (not enrolled — Tyrion keeps her off the book).

edges.quote: Inkpots raised an eyebrow
edges.note: Inkpots (Tybero Istarion), the company paymaster, administers the book-signing.

edges.quote: Once Meereen is taken
edges.note: The Second Sons camp sits in the siege lines outside Meereen.

edges.quote: The Second Sons are on the losing side.
edges.note: ARC TERMINUS SEAM: joining the Second Sons puts Tyrion inside the Meereen siege with agency. ENABLES (precondition for a future free act — the cloak-turn-back, which is TWOW and NOT minted). Wires the whole Tyrion-Essos arc into the S144 siege-of-meereen. Tier-3, flagged verify (the in-ADWD effect on the siege is only potential).

edges.quote: the poison mushrooms he had plucked from the grounds of Illyrio's manse
edges.note: Tyrion carries the poison mushrooms (plucked at Illyrio's manse) through the whole journey — his suicide/escape failsafe, later used on Nurse. Lights the 0-edge tyrions-mushrooms node.

edges.quote: There are turtles crawling out his arse.
edges.note: Tyrion finally beats Haldon at cyvasse (the secrets-wager game) aboard the Shy Maid — Haldon had bet 'the day you defeat me will be the day turtles crawl out my arse.'

edges.quote: Yollo wins again. Death in four.
edges.note: Tyrion (as Yollo) beats Brown Ben Plumm 4 of 5 cyvasse games in Yezzan's tent — and reads Plumm's cautious style, intelligence he later weaponizes to recruit him.

edges.quote: I hear you're twice a turncloak, Plumm. A man after mine own heart.
edges.note: Tyrion cons Brown Ben — flattery ('a man after mine own heart') plus the dragon-blood hook — to bend the Second Sons toward switching sides. MANIPULATES via_flattery.

edges.quote: Not only do I know that the queen's dragons took to you, but I know why.
edges.note: Tyrion reveals to Plumm that he knows Plumm carries dragon blood (the Plumm/Targaryen lineage) — the persuasion hook. An act of revealing, not a theory assertion.

edges.quote: Penny collected her dog and pig and led them both below.
edges.note: Pretty Pig is Penny's sow (the dwarf-show mount). Lights the pretty-pig node.

edges.quote: Penny collected her dog and pig and led them both below.
edges.note: Crunch is Penny's dog (her dwarf-show mount). Lights the crunch node.

edges.quote: It was Lemore who forced the water from your lungs after Griff had pulled you up.
edges.note: BORDERLINE: the stone-men attack is the vector of Jon Connington's greyscale — Griff entered the Rhoyne to pull Tyrion out and was infected (jon-connington AFFLICTED_BY greyscale + greyscale MOTIVATES jon-connington already exist). Wires the causally-islanded stone-men-attack hub (cOut=cIn=0) to its consequence. Grammar-iffy (event->disease-entity); fresh-verify may drop or re-route.
